## Change

Describe the observable behavior and why it belongs in the open standard or
portable runtime.

## Compatibility

- [ ] No normative compatibility impact
- [ ] Backward-compatible specification change with fixtures
- [ ] Breaking change with migration guidance and versioning proposal

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check` passes from a clean checkout
- [ ] Tests or conformance fixtures cover the change
- [ ] Fixtures and examples are fully synthetic
- [ ] No credentials, private topology, customer data, or private vocabulary are included
- [ ] Every commit has a DCO `Signed-off-by` line
